entity.label: Kedemoth
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Beginnings; easternmost, a city of Reuben, assigned to the Levites of the family of Merari (Josh. 13:18). It lay not far north-east of Dibon-gad, east of the Dead Sea.

nodes.label: Kedemoth
nodes.description: Beginnings; easternmost, a city of Reuben, assigned to the Levites of the family of Merari (Josh. 13:18). It lay not far north-east of Dibon-gad, east of the Dead Sea.

verses.text: And I sent messengers out of the wilderness of Kedemoth unto Sihon king of Heshbon with words of peace, saying,
And Jahazah, and Kedemoth, and Mephaath,
Kedemoth with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs; four cities.
Kedemoth also with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs:
